title: Implement Session Authorization
description: Create middleware to protect API endpoints by validating the session token (e.g., JWT) from the request headers.
ai_instructions: Create a FastAPI dependency to be placed before protected routes. It should decode the JWT from the 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' header, verify its signature, and attach the user's identity to the request object for downstream handlers. If the token is invalid or missing, it must raise an HTTPException with a 401/403 status.
execution_steps: In 'test_authorization.py', write pytest tests for a new protected endpoint. The tests should check that a valid token grants access and an invalid/missing token returns a 401 error.
Run 'pytest backend/tests/test_authorization.py' to see the tests fail.
Create 'backend/app/dependencies.py' and implement a 'get_current_user' dependency that decodes and verifies the JWT.
Create a new protected test endpoint in 'backend/app/main.py' that uses the 'get_current_user' dependency.
Run 'pytest backend/tests/test_authorization.py' to verify the implementation.
Add '@trace TASK-009' to all modified files.
definition_of_done: FastAPI dependency successfully protects routes from unauthenticated access.
Dependency correctly decodes a valid token and returns user info.
Dependency rejects requests with invalid or missing tokens with a 401 status.
All tests for the authorization dependency pass.
